title: Ice- and Snow-Melting Heater Controls
full_text:
5.2.8.7 Ice- and Snow-Melting Heater Controls
Ice- and Snow-Melting Heater Controls
1) Ice- and snow-melting heaters shall be provided with automatic controls or
readily accessible manual controls that allow them to be shut down when not required.

sentences.text: Ice- and snow-melting heaters shall be provided with automatic controls or readily accessible manual controls that allow them to be shut down when not required.
